summary_ja: raw-backlog-ingest バッチ（2026-05-31）。5件中0件がAI/LLM関連。susam.netの数学ノート、Dan Luuの物理学記事、Karpathyの博士課程ガイド・AI創作小説、filfre.netの歴史ミステリー—全て非AIコンテンツまたは既存wikiページで収録済み。take=0, reference=0, skip=5。

decisions.title: Mar '26 Notes - Susam Pal
decisions.reason_ja: ★★☆☆☆ 代数グラフ理論の数学ノート＋Wander Console開発記録。AI/LLM/エージェント技術の言及なし。純粋な数学・個人開発メモ
decisions.body_excerpt: This is my third set of monthly notes for this year. In these notes, I capture various interesting facts and ideas I have stumbled upon during the month. Like in the last two months, I have been learning and exploring algebraic graph theory...

decisions.title: su3su2u1 physics tumblr archive

decisions.body_excerpt: These are archived from the now defunct su3su2u1 tumblr. A Roundabout Approach to Quantum Mechanics. This will be the first post in what I hope will be a series that outlines some ideas from quantum mechanics...

decisions.title: A Survival Guide to a PhD
decisions.reason_ja: ★★☆☆☆ 既に `entities/karpathy-writings.md` line 83に「A Survival Guide to a PhD (Sep 2016)」として収録済み。博士課程サバイバルガイド—AI技術コンテンツではなく人生 advice
decisions.body_excerpt: This guide is patterned after my 'Doing well in your courses', a post I wrote a long time on some of the tips/tricks I've developed during my undergrad...

decisions.title: Short Story on AI: A Cognitive Discontinuity
decisions.reason_ja: ★★☆☆☆ AIを題材とした創作ショートストーリー（2015年）。エージェントの「shaping」、HIT、Visceralエージェント等のSF的設定。技術分析ではなく創作文芸。既に `karpathy-writings.md` と `karpathy-ideas.md` で言及・収録済み
decisions.body_excerpt: The idea of writing a collection of short stories has been on my mind for a while. This post is my first ever half-serious attempt at a story, and what better way to kick things off than with a story on AI...

decisions.title: The Mystery of Rennes-le-Château, Part 5: The Man Behind the Curtain
decisions.reason_ja: ★☆☆☆☆ ピエール・プランタールとレンヌ＝ル＝シャトーの謎に関する歴史記事。AI/LLM/技術関連性ゼロ。純粋な歴史・ミステリーコンテンツ
decisions.body_excerpt: Pierre Plantard in 1942, at age 22. It is possible to trace the Plantard family tree a fair ways back without relying on the Lobineau dossier, but not as far back as the time when the Merovingian kings ruled over the nascent nation of France...
